name: ncbi-datasets
description: Search metadata and download genomic data from NCBI Datasets — genomes, taxonomy, annotations. Not affiliated with NIH, NLM, or NCBI.
long_description:
Provides Claude with access to NCBI Datasets v2 for querying and downloading genome assemblies, taxonomy records, and associated annotation files (GFF3, GBFF, protein/RNA FASTA). On first use, the required NCBI CLI tools are installed automatically.

This is an independent community tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by NIH, NLM, NCBI, or the NCBI Datasets team.

ncbi_api_key.title: NCBI API Key
ncbi_api_key.description: Optional NCBI API key. Increases the rate limit from 3 to 10 requests/second. Get one free at https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account/

ncbi_download_dir.title: Download Directory
ncbi_download_dir.description: Where genome and taxonomy packages will be saved. Defaults to your Downloads folder if left blank.
